title: herdr port: wire types, HerdrControl+HerdrStream traits, Fake adapter, CLI adapter
action: Build the herdr seam per decisions da82b90f + DISCOVERY. wire.rs: TerminalFrame (seq,encoding,width,height,full,bytes-base64), input msgs (terminal.input text|bytes, resize, scroll, release), Snapshot (workspace>tab>pane>agent + AgentStatus working/blocked/done/idle), event envelopes, ProtocolInfo (pin exact 16). mod.rs: HerdrControl (snapshot, ping, workspace_create, agent_start) + HerdrStream (observe→FrameStream, control→ControlSession) async traits. fake.rs: in-memory adapter emitting real-shaped frames + a snapshot with agents in each status, drivable for e2e. cli.rs: subprocess adapter prepending --session always, protocol pin check, NDJSON parse.

truths: protocol pin is exact-match 16 with typed mismatch error
prohibitions: No HERDR_SESSION env reliance (herdr ignores it)
Tier 2 relay path must not require core layer

verify: cargo test --quiet herdr && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: herdr seam built per da82b90f: wire types (7-field frame, control msgs, snapshot hierarchy, exact protocol pin 16), HerdrControl+HerdrStream async traits, FakeHerdr (drivable in-memory, emits full-then-diff frames, echoes input, models down state — the e2e substrate), CliHerdr (subprocess, --session always prepended, NDJSON parse, EOF=closed). 15 tests. Committed 6c66c00.
trace.verification_evidence:
15 herdr tests + 49 total pass, clippy -D warnings clean. Coverage:
- frame_round_trips_the_seven_fields; protocol_pin_is_exact_match
- command_always_prepends_session (--session before any verb)
- Fake: full-frame-first-then-diffs, control_echoes_typed_input, driven statuses, unavailable-when-down
- CLI parse: frame / closed / skip-unknown(graphics)/blank
trace.verify_output: 15 herdr tests pass (frame 7-field round-trip, exact protocol pin, --session always prepended, Fake drives statuses + full-then-diff frames + control echo, NDJSON parse incl closed/skip); clippy clean; 49 total tests green
trace.verify_command: cargo test --quiet herdr && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings
